completed_tasks.name: Create GitHub repo + push Phase 0 PR
completed_tasks.notes: Repo: https://github.com/Jaywesterlow/trinity-breath-healing (PRIVATE). PR #1: https://github.com/Jaywesterlow/trinity-breath-healing/pull/1 (phase-0-foundation -> main). main reset to initial commit 79d0c9a so PR has a diff.

remaining_tasks.name: Connect Vercel to GitHub repo + set PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var
remaining_tasks.notes: User must do manually via Vercel dashboard. See PLAN.md Task 2.

remaining_tasks.name: Configure main-branch protection with Plan 08 gates as required status checks
remaining_tasks.notes: Agent can do via gh CLI after CI run names confirmed from a real workflow run.

remaining_tasks.name: Search Console verification + production smoke test + PHASE0-LAUNCH-CHECKLIST.md
remaining_tasks.notes: Needs production deploy. Search Console HTML file -> static/. PHASE0-LAUNCH-CHECKLIST.md template already exists.

blockers.description: Task 2 requires user to connect Vercel to GitHub in the Vercel dashboard — cannot be automated

human_actions_pending.action: Connect Vercel to trinity-breath-healing GitHub repo via vercel.com
human_actions_pending.context: Add New Project -> import from GitHub -> select trinity-breath-healing -> SvelteKit auto-detected -> deploy -> Settings -> Env Vars -> PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://trinity-breath-healing.vercel.app for Production AND Preview

decisions.decision: main branch reset to initial commit 79d0c9a; all Phase 0 work on phase-0-foundation
decisions.rationale: GitHub needs base/head to differ to create a PR. main = seed commit, phase-0-foundation = all work.

decisions.decision: gh CLI invoked via full path C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe with GH_CONFIG_DIR set
decisions.rationale: gh not on PATH in Claude shell. Must use: $env:GH_CONFIG_DIR = '$env:APPDATA\GitHub CLI'; & 'C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe' ...

next_action: User connects Vercel via dashboard. Once preview deploy + CI run exist, agent wires branch protection (Task 3) via gh CLI, then guides Search Console verification (Task 4).
context_notes: Plan 09 is all human checkpoints. Task 1 done. CI will run once Vercel preview deploy exists. Branch protection can be set by agent via gh CLI after first CI run. Task 4 (Search Console) always manual.
